name: How is fault determined in a work neck injury comp claim?

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined in a work neck injury comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp is no-fault; covers if arose from employment, regardless of your fault.[4] Key factors: (1) Not negligence-based; (2) Idiopathic ok if work increased risk; (3) Employer not sued. Focus on causation. Simplifies process.
